myc.caption: K562 ChromBPNet normalized observed and predicted accessibility (DNase, ATAC), bias-corrected predicted accessibility (DNase, ATAC), and counts contribution scores (DNase, ATAC, GATA2, SP1, CEBPB, JUND, GABPB1) from the ENCODE portal, 1235 bp contig of chr8:127,898,412-127,899,647. Contribution tracks are dynseq logos (base height proportional to DeepSHAP contribution). Drag to pan, scroll/buttons to zoom.

instances.caption: The same MYC-enhancer-2 locus showing the K562 DNase and ATAC counts contribution (SHAP) tracks with the model's own FiNeMo motif-instance calls beneath each. Hit color encodes confidence: green = high-confidence validated motif, red = low-confidence / repressive, grey = unvalidated. Hover a hit for its motif name and strand.

var_wt.caption: K562 ChromBPNet predicted accessibility profile and counts SHAP for the reference 2114 bp window centered on rs11553699 (highlighted). Panels are linked: pan/zoom one and the other follows. Predicted total counts (DNase) WT 346 vs MUT 153.
